parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE validation_status='pending_analyst') as pending_validation,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE validation_status='validated' AND remediation_status='open') as open_validated,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE priority_bucket='immediate_attention' AND remediation_status NOT IN ('verified_fixed','closed')) as immediate_open,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM retest_records WHERE result IS NULL AND scheduled_at < NOW()) as overdue_retests,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM engagements WHERE status='active' AND NOW() BETWEEN testing_window_start AND testing_window_end) as active_engagements,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE first_seen >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as new_findings_24h,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM normalized_findings WHERE validation_status='verified_fixed' AND closed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') as fixed_24h;

SELECT nf.title, nf.severity, nf.recon_score, nf.priority_bucket, a.asset_value, e.name as engagement_name
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE nf.validation_status IN ('validated','analyst_reviewed')
  AND nf.remediation_status = 'open'
ORDER BY nf.recon_score DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT nf.id as finding_id, nf.title, nf.severity, a.asset_value,
       EXTRACT(DAYS FROM NOW() - nf.validated_at) as days_overdue
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN assets a ON nf.asset_id = a.id
WHERE nf.validation_status = 'validated'
  AND nf.remediation_status NOT IN ('verified_fixed','accepted_risk')
  AND (
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'immediate_attention' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') OR
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'high_priority' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') OR
    (nf.priority_bucket = 'medium_priority' AND nf.validated_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days')
  )
ORDER BY days_overdue DESC
LIMIT 10;

parameters.jsCode:
const stats = $('Get Daily Stats').first().json;
const topRisks = $('Get Top Open Risks').all().map(i => i.json);
const overdueSLA = $('Get Overdue SLA').all().map(i => i.json);
const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

const statusIcon = n => parseInt(n) === 0 ? '✅' : parseInt(n) < 3 ? '⚠️' : '🔴';

const topRisksText = topRisks.length > 0
  ? topRisks.map((f,i) => `  ${i+1}. [${f.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${f.title}\n     Asset: ${f.asset_value} | Score: ${f.recon_score}/10`).join('\n')
  : '  None — clean queue!';

const overdueText = overdueSLA.length > 0
  ? overdueSLA.map(f => `  ⏰ [${f.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${f.title} — ${Math.round(f.days_overdue)}d overdue`).join('\n')
  : '  None overdue';

const briefing = [
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`,
  `🎯 RECON OS — Daily Briefing — ${today}`,
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`,
  ``,
  `📊 STATUS SNAPSHOT`,
  `  Active Engagements:    ${stats.active_engagements}`,
  `  ${statusIcon(stats.immediate_open)} Immediate Attention:  ${stats.immediate_open} open`,
  `  ${statusIcon(stats.pending_validation)} Pending Validation:   ${stats.pending_validation} findings`,
  `  ${statusIcon(stats.overdue_retests)} Overdue Retests:      ${stats.overdue_retests}`,
  `  📥 New Findings (24h): ${stats.new_findings_24h}`,
  `  ✅ Fixed (24h):        ${stats.fixed_24h}`,
  ``,
  `🔥 TOP 5 OPEN RISKS`,
  topRisksText,
  ``,
  `⏰ SLA BREACHES`,
  overdueText,
  ``,
  `📋 ACTIONS NEEDED`,
  stats.pending_validation > 0 ? `  → ${stats.pending_validation} findings awaiting analyst validation` : '',
  stats.overdue_retests > 0 ? `  → ${stats.overdue_retests} retests overdue` : '',
  stats.immediate_open > 0 ? `  → ${stats.immediate_open} IMMEDIATE ATTENTION findings unresolved` : '',
  ``,
  `━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━`
].filter(l => l !== null && l !== undefined).join('\n');

return [{ json: { briefing, date: today, has_urgency: parseInt(stats.immediate_open) > 0 || parseInt(stats.overdue_retests) > 0 } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.briefing, username: 'RECON OS Daily Brief', icon_emoji: ':briefcase:' }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-17: Daily Briefing — 07:00 Slack digest covering active engagements, immediate risks, pending validations, overdue SLAs, new findings, and closures from the last 24h.
